S.FORM: I 1951 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Michelle Bachelet , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Chile anini i ci Michelle Bachelet, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 11 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mi ¶ƒß…ô…æ…æ…ô b~b~va ¶ƒß…ô…æ…ôt , ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶ƒßi…æ…ô anini i ¶i mi ¶ƒß…ô…æ…æ…ô b~b~va ¶ƒß…ô…æ…ôt, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: I 1951 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Michelle Bachelet , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Chile anini i ci Michelle Bachelet, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 11 a romi'ad.
